data.body: SUBMITTED: Gerrit 424 (A3/34b1) + 432 (C2/c244) both MERGED to main (submitted 432, auto-submitted ancestor 424; both Verified+1 + LLM-Review+1). 2 of 6 epic children now closed+certified+landed. Remaining: B1(a118) plan advanced+deferred (streak-persistence design + 3hr live gates), 9622 plan advanced (recovery-window design flaw captured), D1(d01e) untouched (live matrix), eca4 untouched (refactor last). Epic ace2 stays in_progress. All continuation resolutions captured as ticket comments.
